headline: CDW Authorizes $1 Billion Share Repurchase Program Increase
summary: VERNON HILLS, Ill., May 13, 2026--CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) announced today that its Board of Directors has authorized a $1 billion increase to the Company’s share repurchase program.

headline: CDW Announces $1B Increase To Stock Buyback Program
